name: playwright-bdd-foundation
description: A small, readable BDD + Playwright E2E starter: Gherkin features over page objects with a typed route catalog.
author: Sergiy Cherednychenko

scripts.e2e:list: cd e2e && bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --list
scripts.e2e:test: cd e2e && bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:ui: cd e2e && bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --ui
